en.name: Sudoku
en.description: Sudoku is a legendary number puzzle game that has captivated millions of players worldwide. Your goal is to fill a 9×9 grid with digits 1-9, ensuring each row, column, and 3×3 box contains every number exactly once. With simple rules but infinite complexity, Sudoku offers the perfect balance of challenge and satisfaction for puzzle enthusiasts of all skill levels. Whether you're a beginner looking for a relaxing brain exercise or an expert seeking the ultimate mental challenge, Sudoku delivers endless hours of logical entertainment.
en.objectives: Complete the grid by placing numbers 1-9 in every row, column, and 3×3 box without repetition. Challenge yourself to solve puzzles faster and with fewer mistakes. Track your progress across multiple difficulty levels from Easy to Expert.
en.howToPlay: Click on an empty cell and enter a number from 1-9. Each row, column, and 3x3 box must contain all digits 1-9 exactly once. Use the notes feature to pencil in possible candidates. Wrong entries are highlighted in red.

rules.controls: Click any cell to select it, then press 1-9 to enter a number. Press Delete, Backspace, or 0 to clear a cell. Use the Notes mode toggle to switch between entering final answers and pencil marks.
mechanics: Each row must contain digits 1-9 without repetition
Each column must contain digits 1-9 without repetition
Each 3×3 box must contain digits 1-9 without repetition
Some cells are pre-filled as clues
Every valid Sudoku has exactly one unique solution
features: Notes Mode - Pencil in possible candidates for each cell
Hint System - Get help when you're stuck
Error Highlighting - Mistakes shown in red
Multiple Difficulty Levels - Easy to Expert

tips: Start with rows, columns, or boxes that have the most filled cells
Use the process of elimination - if a number can only go in one cell, place it
Look for "naked pairs" - two cells that can only contain the same two numbers
Use notes to track all possible candidates for each cell

faq.question: Is there always only one solution?
faq.answer: Yes, every valid Sudoku puzzle has exactly one unique solution that can be found through logic alone, without guessing.

faq.question: What's the best strategy for beginners?
faq.answer: Start by scanning rows, columns, and boxes for numbers that can only go in one place. Use the notes feature liberally to track possibilities.

faq.question: How do I get better at Sudoku?
faq.answer: Practice regularly, learn advanced techniques like naked pairs and hidden singles, and challenge yourself with harder difficulty levels.

faq.question: What makes a Sudoku hard?
faq.answer: Harder puzzles require more advanced solving techniques and have fewer initial clues, requiring deeper logical reasoning chains.

zh.name: 数独
zh.description: 数独是一款风靡全球的经典数字谜题游戏。你的目标是在9×9的网格中填入1-9的数字，确保每行、每列和每个3×3宫格中的数字都不重复。规则简单却变化无穷，数独为各水平的谜题爱好者提供了完美的挑战与满足感。无论你是寻求轻松大脑锻炼的初学者，还是追求极限挑战的高手，数独都能带来无尽的逻辑推理乐趣。
zh.objectives: 完成网格填入，使每行、每列和每个3×3宫格都包含1-9的所有数字且不重复。挑战自己以更快的速度和更少的错误完成谜题。从简单到专家多个难度级别任你选择。
zh.howToPlay: 点击空白单元格并输入1-9的数字。每行、每列和每个3x3宫格必须恰好包含1-9的所有数字。使用笔记功能标记可能的候选数字。错误的输入会以红色高亮显示。

rules.controls: 点击任意格子选中，然后按1-9输入数字。按Delete、Backspace或0清除格子。使用笔记模式切换在最终答案和候选数字之间。
mechanics: 每行必须包含1-9数字且不重复
每列必须包含1-9数字且不重复
每个3×3宫格必须包含1-9数字且不重复
部分格子会预先填入作为提示
每个有效的数独谜题都只有一个唯一解
features: 笔记模式 - 在格子中标记可能的候选数字
提示系统 - 遇到困难时获取帮助
错误高亮 - 错误会以红色显示
多种难度 - 从简单到专家级别

tips: 从填满单元格最多的行、列或宫格开始
使用排除法——如果一个数字只能放在一个单元格，就填入它
寻找"裸对"——两个只能包含相同两个数字的单元格
使用笔记追踪每个单元格的所有可能候选数字

faq.question: 数独谜题是否只有唯一解？
faq.answer: 是的，每个有效的数独谜题都只有一个唯一解，可以通过纯逻辑推理找到，无需猜测。

faq.question: 初学者最好的策略是什么？
faq.answer: 首先扫描行、列和宫格，找出只能放在一个位置的数字。充分利用笔记功能记录可能性。

faq.question: 如何提高数独水平？
faq.answer: 定期练习，学习高级技巧如裸对和隐性候选，并挑战更高难度的谜题。

faq.question: 什么让数独变得困难？
faq.answer: 更难的谜题需要更高级的解题技巧，初始提示更少，需要更深的逻辑推理链条。
